payload.message:
Chay: node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 1 20
Doc ket qua JSON, phan loai email:
- report_submission: Bao cao tu 14 truong phong
- urgent: Tu khach hang OEM (EAL, Quiet Cool), NPP, co deadline
- approval_request: Yeu cau duyet
- external: Tu doi tac quoc te
- general_internal: Noi bo thong thuong

Voi moi email, xem co can hanh dong gi khong.
Gui bao cao tom tat cho CEO qua Zalo (dung emoji phan loai).
Log vao Google Sheets bang: node /app/google-tools/sheets-write.js $GOOGLE_SHEET_ID "'5. Email Action Log'!A:J" '<data>'

Chay: node /app/google-tools/calendar-read.js 2
Doc ket qua JSON, trinh bay lich hop hom nay va ngay mai.
Format:
LICH HOP — [Ngay]
[Gio] — [Ten cuoc hop] — [Nguoi tham gia]
Danh dau cuoc hop quan trong.
Gui qua Zalo cho Sep Khanh.

Chuan bi noi dung HOP GIAO BAN sang thu 2. Doc 5 nguon tu Google Sheets:
1. Report Tracker - tinh hinh nop bao cao 14 phong ban
2. KPI Tracker - so lieu KPI tuan qua
3. Email Action Log - cac email quan trong da xu ly
4. Attachment Analysis Log - bao cao da phan tich
5. Google Calendar - lich hop tuan nay

Tao bao cao 6 phan:
1. Tong quan tuan qua
2. Tinh hinh phong ban (14 BP)
3. KPI highlights
4. Email & van de can xu ly
5. Lich hop tuan moi
6. De xuat CEO

Gui qua Zalo (chia thanh nhieu tin nhan neu dai).
Tao Google Doc chia se voi team.
Tao bao cao kinh doanh tuan. Doc KPI Tracker va Sales data tu Google Sheets. Phan tich doanh thu, chi phi, loi nhuan. So sanh voi tuan truoc va target. Gui CEO qua Zalo.

Gui email NHAC NHO 14 truong bo phan nop bao cao tuan. Danh sach (xem MEMORY.md de lay email chinh xac):
1. R&D - anh Nam (namph@nsca.vn)
2. HCNS - anh Son (sondv@nsca.vn)
3. PKD - anh Ngoc (ndao@nsca.vn)
4. BD Noi dia - anh Duc (ductm@nsca.vn)
5. BD International - anh Santiago (santiago@nsca.vn) — GUI TIENG ANH
6. Back Office - chi Tam (tamntt@nsca.vn)
7. TCKT - anh Duan (duannt@nsca.vn)
8. GD Nha may/SX Nhom - anh Ngoc (ngocnv@nsca.vn)
9. SX Thep - anh Tung (tunghm@nsca.vn)
10. Co Dien - anh Phong (phongdv@nsca.vn)
11. QAQC - anh Tuan (tuannl@nsca.vn)
12. Kho - chi Ha (hant@nsca.vn)
13. Giao Hang - anh Duc (ducvt@nsca.vn)
14. Cung Ung - chi Kim Anh (anhdtk@nsca.vn)

Dung gmail-send.js de gui tung email. Xung 'em', goi 'anh/chi' tuy gioi tinh.
Deadline: Thu 6 17:00. Log vao Google Sheets 'Report Tracker'.

Kiem tra sheet 'Report Tracker' xem phong ban nao CHUA NOP bao cao tuan nay. Gui email KHAN CAP cho cac phong ban chua nop, voi tieu de '[KHAN CAP] Yeu cau nop bao cao tuan'. Thong bao CEO qua Zalo danh sach phong ban chua nop.

Kiem tra sheet 'Report Tracker'. Neu van con phong ban CHUA NOP bao cao, gui bao cao ESCALATION cho CEO qua Zalo:
- Danh sach phong ban da nop (co ngay gio)
- Danh sach phong ban CHUA nop (da nhac 2 lan)
- De xuat hanh dong cho CEO

Doc sheet 'KPI Tracker' tu Google Sheets. Phan tich KPI tuan:
- Doanh thu vs target
- San luong vs ke hoach
- Chi phi vs ngan sach
- Cac chi so bat thuong
Tao bang tong hop co emoji (xanh/vang/do). Gui CEO qua Zalo.

PHAN TICH CHENH LECH KHKD 2026. Doc 3 sheet tu Google Sheets:
1. 'KHKD 2026 Baseline' - Target 10 nganh hang theo thang (tong ~251.7 ty)
2. 'KPI Tracker' - So lieu thuc te
3. 'NPP Tracker' - Doanh so 5 NPP (GLX, VNMEP, NTK, IMP, MEPCO)

Tinh toan:
- Variance thang hien tai: Actual vs Target cho tung nganh hang
- % dat cho tung NPP
- YTD progress
- Traffic light: xanh >=100%, vang >=80%, do <80%

Phan tich:
- Top 3 nganh hang dat/vuot vs top 3 duoi target
- NPP manh/yeu nhat
- Risk va co hoi
- 3-5 de xuat cu the cho CEO

Gui Zalo (chia phan neu dai). Log vao 'Variance Log'.

BAO CAO TUAN CLIMANEXUS (cong ty con). Doc 3 sheet:
1. 'ClimaNexus KPI' - Chi so hoat dong
2. 'ClimaNexus Milestones' - Roadmap 12 thang, trang thai
3. 'ClimaNexus Pipeline' - Du an tiem nang

Bao cao:
- KPI: doanh thu, R&D, patent, VC meetings
- Milestone: da hoan thanh vs qua han
- Pipeline: tong gia tri, giai doan
- De xuat 2-3 uu tien cho CEO

Gui qua Zalo.

BAO CAO THI TRUONG QUOC TE (Santiago de los Reyes - OMDM). Doc 3 sheet:
1. 'Export Revenue Tracker' - Doanh thu xuat khau theo thi truong
2. 'International Pipeline' - Doi tac OEM/ODM/Distribution
3. 'Santiago KPI Tracker' - KPI 24 thang theo MIP

MIP targets:
- GTM plan approved trong 3 thang
- 3 doi tac chien luoc
- Export revenue $300K Y1, $1M Y2
- 2 trien lam quoc te/nam

Boi canh: Thi truong VAV Box toan cau $6.4B (2024) -> $23.9B (2030), APAC 40%.

Phan tich: pipeline, tien do KPI, co hoi thi truong.
Gui CEO qua Zalo.
